subject: I'm confident, but I need your help!
body:
| | | I need your support!
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive2.com/?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=741cdb2a9b&e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---

---|---
| | [](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=cd38aafc9e&e=19cebfe173) | [Tweet](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=702cdd0678&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](http://us13.forward-to-friend1.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=741cdb2a9b&e=19cebfe173) | [Forward to a Friend](http://us13.forward-to-friend1.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=741cdb2a9b&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| Greetings,
---
| We're getting down to the wire and our next big campaign finance deadline is just 48 hours away!

Thanks to your support, **I am confident that if the election were today, we’d win** – that’s why my opponent and her out-of-state supporters are already running misleading and negative ads! This election is going to be incredibly close and Sue will be closing in. That is why I need your help!

We have just a few weeks left to go and this election is going to come down to one thing: financial resources.

**The resources we raise over the next couple days will go directly towards television ads – which are absolutely essential in order to keep our lead and win in November.

[Can I count on you once again](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=ff4ee5fc2a&e=19cebfe173)[? Any amount helps!](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=5e30a0d685&e=19cebfe173)**

Phil

---
| [CLICK HERE TO DONATE TODAY!](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f0f828f039&e=19cebfe173 "CLICK HERE TO DONATE TODAY!")

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Are you with me tonight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
Tonight's debate | | I just took on Donald Trump in our first presidential debate.

Derek, I hope I showed that I will never stop fighting for you or the people you love. But I need you with me. Your contribution right now is about much more than money -- it shows that no matter how hard this race gets, you’ll still be there for me.

**Chip in tonight and show that you’re standing by my side.** | **You’re one of our most committed supporters. If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately:
** | **[**Derek, donate now: $1**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjY2MjI5MDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0MjU4NzY2S0&mt=1&rt=0) **
---
**[**Derek, donate now: $5**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjY2MjI5MDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0MjU4NzY2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**[**Derek, donate now: $10**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjY2MjI5MDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0MjU4NzY2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**[**Derek, donate now: $25**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjY2MjI5MDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0MjU4NzY2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**[**Derek, donate now: $50**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjY2MjI5MDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0MjU4NzY2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**
Thank you,

Hillary

**Stand with Hillary tonight -- chip in $1 to become an official Debate Donor, and get a free sticker, too:**
| [

---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](https://www.hillaryclinton.com/forms/contact-us/) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjY2MjI5MDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0MjU4NzY2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjY2MjI5MDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0MjU4NzY2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjY2MjI5MDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0MjU4NzY2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjY2MjI5MDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0MjU4NzY2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY2MjI5MDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0MjU4NzY2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY2MjI5MDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0MjU4NzY2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjY2MjI5MDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0MjU4NzY2S0&mt=1&rt=0). name: ANNOUNCEMENT (via DSCC)
subject: about tonight (very quick)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
The first presidential debate of 2016 is in the books. Now everyone is watching to see if Democrats can meet this moment with a surge of grassroots support.
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab2?refcode=DPE-20160926-AnnouncementDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
**_URGENT: Need Democrats to step up TONIGHT!_**
[**Pitch in RIGHT NOW >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab2?refcode=DPE-20160926-AnnouncementDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**[](https://secure.dscc. Pull it off, and we'll elect a Senate that will support Hillary Clinton, defend our progress, and stop Donald Trump's agenda in its tracks. **Fall short, and Republicans will keep their momentum and cruise to another DECADE in power.**

It's all up to you, Friend.

[**The next 24 hours could decide this election. Pitch in for the surge we need to score a sweeping Democratic victory on Election Day!**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab2?refcode=DPE-20160926-AnnouncementDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

We only get one chance to capitalize on this huge moment. [**Don 't miss out -- pitch in tonight and give Democrats the boost we need to win.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab2?refcode=DPE-20160926-AnnouncementDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks,
Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

Together, we're going to take back the Senate in November, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjY2MjI5NzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0MjYyMzA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

subject: DEADLINE: Standing with Mr. Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Time is running short & your support is crucial! Add your name to our all-important 3rd quarter FEC fundraising report. |

Friend, I know you strongly support Mr. Trump, and want to see him win this election and Make America Great Again – and I can’t thank you enough for standing with us. Today, I’m writing to urgently ask you to take your support of the campaign to the next level. We want to add your name to our all-important last quarterly fundraising report of the campaign. You see, Mr. Trump is counting on you – and millions of other fed up patriots like you – as he takes on the Clinton campaign machine, the corrupt political establishment, the special interests and the lying liberal media. And this is the best opportunity you have to get more involved and show the world you’re taking a stand against Crooked Hillary. Mr. Trump has committed up to $2 million to match all contributions we receive in advance of the final FEC quarterly reporting deadline of this campaign – coming up fast at MIDNIGHT on Friday, September 30th. Add you name to our FEC report to show Crooked Hillary and her cronies exactly where you stand. Make a $100, $75, $50, or $35 contribution today, and Mr. Trump will write a matching check to DOUBLE the impact of your support. CONTRIBUTE $100 >>> DOUBLES TO $200 CONTRIBUTE $75 >>> DOUBLES TO $150 CONTRIBUTE $50 >>> DOUBLES TO $100 CONTRIBUTE $35 >>> DOUBLES TO $70 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT Mr. Trump is surging in battleground states as well as among independents nationwide, and the reason is clear. The American people see the devastation that has been inflicted upon our nation after nearly eight years of Barack Obama in the White House, and they know that a Crooked Hillary presidency will mean more of the same AND WORSE. We have tremendous momentum right now, and can’t let up for a moment – that’s why taking your support of Mr. Trump to the next level is so important. No matter the amount you give, it will make a direct difference in these final weeks of the campaign. We need you on board to WIN, so Mr. Trump can go to Washington, fight for us and Make America Great Again. Please take your involvement to the next level today, and add your name to our Q3 FEC fundraising report. Remember, Mr. Trump will write a check to match any contribution you make dollar-for-dollar, up to $2 million, but we must receive it by 11:59 PM on Friday night. Thank you, Friend – we hope to hear from you. Sincerely, Brad Parscale Digital Director, Trump for President CONTRIBUTE $100 >>> DOUBLES TO $200 CONTRIBUTE $75 >>> DOUBLES TO $150 CONTRIBUTE $50 >>> DOUBLES TO $100 CONTRIBUTE $35 >>> DOUBLES TO $70 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

subject: Check this off your list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8892288629716154368/-2748743284686452736?SQF_S=ck)

Hello,

We both know there is a lot at stake in this election. The future of Missouri's working families, economy, schools -- just to name a few things.

You will have a chance to make your voice heard on all of these important issues in less than six weeks, as long as you have done one very important thing.

[REGISTER TO VOTE OR UPDATE YOUR REGISTRATION](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8892288629716154368/-2748743284686452736?SQF_S=ck)

More than one million eligible voters in Missouri are currently unregistered. If you have never registered in Missouri -- or if you have moved since you last registered -- you may be one of them. If you are unsure about your voter registration status, you can check on the [Secretary of State's website.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8892288629716154368/-2604628096610596864)

If you still need to register or update your information, today is National Voter Registration Day and the perfect time to check this off your list. **And good news **--** you can now complete your entire registration online. [Click here for step-by-step instructions.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8892288629716154368/-2748743284686452736?SQF_S=ck)**

Don't delay -- the deadline to register is just two weeks away on October 12.

See you at the polls,

Andrew Whalen
Campaign Manager, ChrisKoster.com

name: Brad =?UTF-8?Q?Johnson=2C=20=23VOTECLIMATE?=
subject: Did you see what Trump said in the debate ??
body:
(http://www.voteclimate.net/?utm_campaign=CHV.Pledge&utm_source=DDC&utm_medium=email&utm_content=P.CHV.TrumpDebate)

Add your name to the #VoteClimate pledge: “I will vote only for climate champions who support a 100% clean energy future, and an end to taxpayer support of fossil fuels.” (http://www.voteclimate.net/?utm_campaign=CHV.Pledge&utm_source=DDC&utm_medium=email&utm_content=P.CHV.TrumpDebate)

Activist -

In last night's debate, Donald Trump denied that he ever said climate change a "hoax" perpetrated by the "Chinese."

Of course, that was a lie. (http://www.voteclimate.net/?utm_campaign=CHV.Pledge&utm_source=DDC&utm_medium=email&utm_content=P.CHV.TrumpDebate) (http://www.voteclimate.net/?utm_campaign=CHV.Pledge&utm_source=DDC&utm_medium=email&utm_content=P.CHV.TrumpDebate)

Trump, along with the rest of the Republican Party leadership, have been anti-science conspiracy theorists for years. The GOP climate denial machine has been key to protecting the deadly profits of the fossil-fuel industry.
We need to put politicians -- all of them -- on notice that the climate crisis is the biggest crisis facing humanity, and if they don’t vote accordingly they’ll be voted out of office in 2016 and every year thereafter, from President to state legislature to school board.

Strike back against Trump's climate denial, and become one of the first Americans to take the #VoteClimate pledge:

“I will vote only for climate champions who support a 100% clean energy future, and an end to taxpayer support of fossil fuels.” (http://www.voteclimate.net/?utm_campaign=CHV.Pledge&utm_source=DDC&utm_medium=email&utm_content=P.CHV.TrumpDebate)

It’s not enough to keep Donald Trump out of office — we have to organize the nation to take on the injustice of unchecked climate pollution.

Together, we can amplify each other’s voices so the media and the politicians notice the rise of the climate voter bloc. The #VoteClimate effort isn’t just a pledge — it’s a grassroots-powered campaign. And the most important part of the pledge is signing up to volunteer — from helping to share the word, all the way to creating custom ballot guides that show which candidates are climate hawks or climate deniers.

Click here to take the #VoteClimate pledge. (http://www.voteclimate.net/?utm_campaign=CHV.Pledge&utm_source=DDC&utm_medium=email&utm_content=P.CHV.TrumpDebate)

Yours,

Brad Johnson
Executive Director
Climate Hawks Vote
If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please visit this link:
http://democrats.ontraport.com/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNjYvMC82ZDJiNTMxZjI0MjMwNWVmMGVhN2M0MTI4NmQzMzcxZS8yNTA4MTI4Ng==

Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

Look, it doesn't get any closer than than Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ forecast from yesterday ⬇ [**Pitch in now >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5522834674251988992/-5581623499404869632?refcode=e20160927.2a&refcode2=e20160927.2nd&amount=25)

---

[**Break the Deadlock. Donate $5 now >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5522834674251988992/-5581623499404869632?refcode=e20160927.2a&refcode2=e20160927.2nd&amount=25)
When I look at these numbers, I'm fired up to see everything this team has built together -- but I'm also seriously concerned that everything we've fought for depends on just __two tenths of a point__...

**Look:** We're on the cusp of making history by electing Katie as Pennsylvania's first woman senator. This race could be the one that flips the Senate for Democrats, but _only if_ we maintain our fighting power for 42 more days.

**[Donate to keep the edge>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5522834674251988992/-5581623499404869632?refcode=e20160927.2a&refcode2=e20160927.2nd&amount=25)**
**But:** _Less than ONE PERCENT_ stands in the way of Toomey getting another six years to put the interests of Wall Street over those of the men and women working harder than ever to get ahead.

**[Quick, tip the race our way>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5522834674251988992/-5581623499404869632?refcode=e20160927.2a&refcode2=e20160927.2nd&amount=25)**
Here's the nerve-racking part: We're up against the war chest of one of the best-funded incumbents in the Senate AND the spending of GOP special interests, who see defeating Katie as their best chance to keep Mitch McConnell in control.

**There 's no room for error. If we're going to win on Election Day, we need to hit every goal and deadline now -- but we're still short of the $75,000 we need to raise before our final FEC quarterly deadline.**

[**Can you rush an urgent contribution? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5522834674251988992/-5581623499404869632?refcode=e20160927.2a&refcode2=e20160927.2nd&amount=25)

[**www.katiemcginty.com/donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5522834674251988992/-5581623499404869632?refcode=e20160927.2a&refcode2=e20160927.2nd&amount=25)

It's up to us,

Kelley
Digital Team
| *** A note on donations ***

Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. We're relying on grassroots donations from people like you to win this race and take back the Senate.
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5522834674251988992/-5581623499404869632?refcode=e20160927.2a&refcode2=e20160927.2nd&amount=25)**

subject: my father’s check for $2 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
My father taught me to never back down when someone attacks you. |

Friend, your contribution today will be instantly matched for double the impact in our race to defeat Hillary Clinton. A few days ago, my father issued a $2 million challenge to pro-America patriots everywhere. If you will give us a critical fundraising surge before the September 30th FEC deadline, my father will match everyone’s donations up to $2 million. My father set a goal to raise $20 million from citizens like you because the Washington special interests are bankrolling Crooked Hillary’s campaign, and he wants to show them the American people are ready for serious change. CONTRIBUTE $100 >>> DOUBLES TO $200 CONTRIBUTE $75 >>> DOUBLES TO $150 CONTRIBUTE $50 >>> DOUBLES TO $100 CONTRIBUTE $35 >>> DOUBLES TO $70 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT While Hillary Clinton is raking in massive donations from liberal elites at closed-door fundraisers, my father is leading a movement powered by Americans like you who are fed-up with the status quo. And right now, my father needs pro-jobs, pro-security, pro-borders Americans like you to rally to his side and help him fight back against smear campaigns from Hillary Clinton and her liberal media cheerleaders. My father taught me to never back down when someone attacks you. Well right now, he’s got the whole liberal elite, the DC insiders and the lobbyist-funded Super PACs all attacking him. He won’t back down, but he needs your help. Please donate today. Every dollar will be immediately matched by another dollar from my father, up to $2 million. Donald Trump, Jr. CONTRIBUTE $100 >>> DOUBLES TO $200

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

name: Eric Holcomb
subject: Momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
On Friday night, we will have less than 40 days to secure our victory in one of the most unprecedented elections of 2016. | | | | | [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/6d2793bd54214a4caa56d553813d22d3?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=27dcb0e3e0b4423dbe4d7940cb976669&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=Image_Header_Logo&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_content=20160927-momentum-16266-direct)
---
Friend, On Friday night, we will have less than **40 days** to secure our victory in one of the most unprecedented elections of 2016. We've been able to build a campaign from the ground up solely because of Hoosier _strength_ and _determination_ and a whole lot of momentum. **And right now, our momentum matters the most as we 're about to face the biggest deadline of our campaign so far. So we're coming to you, Friend.** In three days, our **3rd quarter fundraising goal** must be met. That means our allies and opponents will be able to see how much we've raised in the critical final months of the campaign and if we're on the path towards victory in November. **So we set the bar high and set a goal to raise $50,000 before our deadline. [Will you chip in and help us reach this milestone?](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/ccbc4fdccffc4caab9d8b86259902661?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=27dcb0e3e0b4423dbe4d7940cb976669&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=Text_Body_Cta_1&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_content=20160927-momentum-16266-direct)** Join us, and the thousands of others, in telling John Gregg and his allies that Hoosiers support the commonsense, conservative solutions that will continue Indiana's momentum! By beating our $50,000 fundraising goal, we'll stay on track to win on Election Day - but we need your help today. **[Contribute $10 or whatever you can today!](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/ecbb00b3acaa4dd7a325bbe5e343b21b?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=27dcb0e3e0b4423dbe4d7940cb976669&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=Text_Body_Cta_2&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_content=20160927-momentum-16266-direct)**

body:
| |

| We're getting nervous here at Murphy HQ.

**We 're still $48,000 short of our $200,000 FEC goal with only 72 hours before the deadline.** The opportunity to reach this incredibly important number is quickly slipping through our fingers.

[_**Can you step up and rush in a contribution before it 's too late?**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2dfd/738133e4/315c4121/7f854e7e/1188193907/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160927?refcode=pme160927_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

If you saw the debate last night, you know how important it is for us to win.

**Democrats need to win back the Senate.** It's the only way to make sure the backwards Republican agenda that Trump showed us last night doesn't make its way into law.

Rubio and his allies know that Florida is a must-win state, just like we do. Our polling is extremely close.

But money is pouring in against us. We're being outspent by nearly three to one.

[_**We cannot afford to miss a single goal -- especially not one as important as our final quarterly FEC goal. Please, if you can, donate before the deadline >>**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2dfd/738133e4/315c4121/7f854e7e/1188193907/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160927?refcode=pme160927_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Thanks,

Team Murphy |

name: Joe Biden
subject: Do your job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Republicans aren't doing their job so I'm joining the DSCC to elect Democrats who will. But with time running out, I need you to step up and get this done.
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab9?refcode=DPE-20160927-Biden-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend, pick any issue -- from jobs and the economy to blocking a Supreme Court nominee and funding to fight public health threats, Republican Senators aren't doing their jobs.

So we've got to elect Democrats who will on day one.

[**But I need you to step up now -- before the quarterly FEC deadline -- because we can 't do it without you.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab9?refcode=DPE-20160927-Biden-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

It starts with us doing OUR job as Democrats -- volunteering, spreading the word, **and donating whatever you can so our grassroots can fight back against the flood of GOP dark money.**

With only 42 days left, this can't wait. The DSCC has helped our candidates come out ahead before -- and trust me, they can do it again. **But not without you.**

**I 'm asking personally because it's now or never to get this done. Will you help the DSCC elect a Democratic Senate majority this November?**

name: QUADRUPLE-MATCH@nrsc.org
subject: FWD: Newt Gingrich’s message about last night’s debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

Immediately following the debate's end, **the liberal mainstream media was quick to declare Hillary Clinton the debate winner. **

Peter, we already know Hillary Clinton's record of secrets, lies, and disqualifying scandals. There is no way we can allow Hillary Clinton to become America's next Commander-In-Chief.

There are only 6 weeks left until Election Day.

We have activated our Quadruple Match program because we MUST hit our goal to stop Hillary and the Democrats by this Friday's FINAL Quarterly FEC Deadline.
**Can you help us? **
Newt Gingrich emailed you. Many of our Republican candidates have all emailed you.
**Your support is the ONLY thing left standing between a victory and defeat this November.**
[**Contribute $35 or more immediately to help propel our Republican campaigns to victory. **](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37811504:WjVw8abNA:m:1:1155937413:9C67CD93E0DB709FA9ABB7B2BD36528C:r)

We need your help to save our Republicans from an ONSLAUGHT of attacks from big-money liberal SuperPACs and the liberal media cronies who are in the tank for Hillary Clinton and Senate Democrats. [**Please step up today**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37811505:WjVw8abNA:m:1:1155937413:9C67CD93E0DB709FA9ABB7B2BD36528C:r).

Thank you,

NRSC
| [QUADRUPLE MATCH](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37811506:WjVw8abNA:m:1:1155937413:9C67CD93E0DB709FA9ABB7B2BD36528C:r)
---

\---Forwarded message---
Sender: Newt Gingrich
Date: Sep 27, 2016
Subject: It's our job to stand together

Peter,

Last night, we witnessed a historic presidential debate.

Donald Trump spoke out on behalf of millions of conservative Americans who are tired of the failed liberal Obama-Clinton agenda. The debate proved what we already know -- **the American people are ready for strong Republican leadership under a President Donald Trump and a strong Republican Senate majority.**

Today, I'm asking you to pledge your support for our Republican ticket -- [**Pitch in $35, $50, $100 or more to make a difference for our Republican candidates today.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37811507:WjVw8abNA:m:1:1155937413:9C67CD93E0DB709FA9ABB7B2BD36528C:r)

The Democrats, along with ultra-liberal SuperPACs, and the Obama-Clinton machine are fighting tooth-and-nail to keep the White House blue and seize control of the U.S. Senate.

**It 's our job to stand together and fight back when the going gets tough.**

Our final End of Quarter deadline of the year is just a few days away.

Our team is depending on you to show you stand with Donald Trump and our Republican Senate leaders running this year -- [**donate $30 or more to help ensure a Republican victory in November and every dollar you give will be QUADRUPLE-MATCHED.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37811508:WjVw8abNA:m:1:1155937413:9C67CD93E0DB709FA9ABB7B2BD36528C:r)

A strong Republican base is crucial to our victory. We need grassroots leaders like you to make a difference and step up now.

Thank you,

Newt Gingrich
| [QUADRUPLE MATCH](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37811509:WjVw8abNA:m:1:1155937413:9C67CD93E0DB709FA9ABB7B2BD36528C:r)
---

name: Russ Feingold
subject: Did you watch the debate last night?
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Did you watch the debate last night? | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4563/1c469400/fc6589/357b44e/1468049584/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-27_eoq5_nd-OOS&refcode=ema_2016-09-27_eoq5_nd-OOS&utm_campaign=eoq5&utm_medium=ema") Folks, Did you watch last night's debate? I did, and I've never seen anything like it. We already know that Donald Trump is unfit to be president of the United States, and that Hillary Clinton, without a doubt, is the right choice. That's not partisan politics: _That's common sense._ But after watching Trump deliver what can best be described as a 90-minute tirade, I'm more committed than ever to making sure he isn't sworn into office come January. My opponent, Senator Ron Johnson, continues to put party over country with his support of Trump. It's yet another example of Senator Johnson putting his own political self-interest ahead of the interests of the Wisconsinites he was elected to represent. And that's wrong. Trump will be in Wisconsin tomorrow, no doubt to deliver more of the same nonsensical, toxic rhetoric we saw in last night's debate. Republicans think they have a chance in Wisconsin, an opportunity to send "Ronald and the Donald" to Washington. **It's not going to happen, because we can do better. And, come November, we will do better -- together.** At midnight on Friday, we're closing the books on our FINAL end-of-quarter deadline before Election Day. This is our last chance to show Senator Johnson, his three super PACs, and the _eleven_ right-wing groups that have supported him what our grassroots team is made of. **[Contribute $5 right now to send a message to Senator Johnson and the party of Trump: We deserve better.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4563/1c469400/fc6589/357b44e/1468049584/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-27_eoq5_nd-OOS&refcode=ema_2016-09-27_eoq5_nd-OOS&utm_campaign=eoq5&utm_medium=ema")** _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4563/1c469400/fc6589/357b44f/1468049584/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-27_eoq5_nd-OOS&refcode=ema_2016-09-27_eoq5_nd-OOS&utm_campaign=eoq5&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [$25 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4563/1c469400/fc6589/357b44c/1468049584/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-27_eoq5_nd-OOS&refcode=ema_2016-09-27_eoq5_nd-OOS&utm_campaign=eoq5&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")

Thanks for standing with me.
Sincerely,
Russ Feingold

name: =?utf-8?Q?Austin=20Chambers=2C=20EricGreitens.com?=
subject: Fight Back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,

We've started fighting back against Chris Koster's lies about Eric.

Chris Koster isn't who he says he is. He's a Clinton-style, crooked, career-politician who will say anything to gain power.
[](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=a91c0c5313&e=84041254e6)
Can you [chip in $100, $50 or $25](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=de20f88577&e=84041254e6) so we can tell the truth about Chris Koster?

Clinton-style, crooked, career-politician Chris Koster wasted millions of taxpayer dollars decorating his own office, was portrayed in the liberal _New York Times_ as the poster boy for corruption, and has said his top priority is expanding Obamacare in Missouri.

Please take a moment to [watch the ad](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=9c3f9b5e2c&e=84041254e6), share it with your friends and family, and [chip](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=cfd87a3f06&e=84041254e6)[ in](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=0f116fc313&e=84041254e6) to help us tell the truth about Clinton-style, crooked, career-politician Chris Koster.

On to Victory,
AC

Austin Chambers
Campaign Manager
Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108
Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on [Facebook](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=e9a6cd054b&e=84041254e6) and [Twitter](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=8cbc544941&e=84041254e6). Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected with the campaign. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=599f1b34a1), but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at [team@ericgreitens.com](mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should [volunteer](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=324d845243&e=84041254e6) with us!

name: Diane Bedwell, jayinslee.com
subject: Nuts and bolts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Help provide essentials for our winning ground game. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTU4OTQxNwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjIwNDYxMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, We're coming into the make-or-break weeks of the campaign. Our focus is on direct, personal contact with voters. We win with a grassroots effort that is second-to-none. We're competing in every part of the state, building on the enthusiastic support of thousands of volunteers. [**To build that grassroots mobilizing effort, we could use your help before our most critical end-of-month deadline yet.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTU4OTQxNwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjIwNDYxMAS2&mt=1&rt=0) Look, organizing efforts take a lot of resources and even a small donation can make a huge difference. Here's how your donation helps supply essential materials and tools for voter outreach: | $12 means we can provide pizza, healthy snacks, and fruit for our dedicated volunteers as they work around the clock to reach voters. | [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTU4OTQxNwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjIwNDYxMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---|---
$20 provides 50 pieces of campaign literature to pass out at community events and during door knocks. | [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTU4OTQxNwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjIwNDYxMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---|---
$63 means we have 30 clipboards for volunteers to use as we go door-to-door talking to voters in person. | [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTU4OTQxNwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjIwNDYxMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---|---
$75 allows us to place a social media ad for one day on Facebook and reach thousands of highly targeted voters in one single push. | [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTU4OTQxNwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjIwNDYxMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---|---
$105 helps pay for three hours of phone banking as we contact voters across Washington. | [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTU4OTQxNwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjIwNDYxMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---|---
Big donations or small, your support before our big deadline will have a huge impact on our mobilizing effort. And for that, Governor Inslee and I are grateful.
[**Contribute to that effort today!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTU4OTQxNwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjIwNDYxMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you for helping provide the essentials for our winning ground game.
Diane
Field Director
[**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTU4OTQxNwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjIwNDYxMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

We just alerted the media, so now we have to make sure it happens. |

Friend, I just learned that we’re only $1 MILLION away from raising a record amount of money in a 24-hour period. We’ve already alerted the media how close we are to breaking this record, and now they’re waiting to see if we can actually make it happen. The press is reporting on it as we speak. But you and I both know that if we don’t break this record now, they’ll use that against us to boost Hillary. Please help us SHATTER our record for a 24-hour period by making a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25 or even $3 -- any amount will help us right now. Friend: this is the final sprint of the election. Our final end-of-quarter deadline is in just three days and the second debate is only 12 days from today. My father always taught me that the secret to winning is to never quit while you’re ahead. We have to keep fighting, we have to keep pushing, we can’t get complacent and give up. This is our moment to surge in the polls to win big this November. name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Bryant?=
subject: [Press Release] Bryant Dominates Second Debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Press Release
Contact: Jason Roe (253)220-5051
Jason@BillBryantForGovernor.com
**Bryant Dominates Second Debate**
_Highlights Four Years of Inslee Failures_
(Seattle, Wash.) – Republican gubernatorial candidate Bill Bryant was the clear winner in last night’s debate, highlighting a laundry list of Inslee Administration failures and broken promises.

Bryant demonstrated his command of the issues facing the state and outlined a clear-eyed approach to fixing them, while Governor Inslee made excuses and shifted blame, rather than take any responsibility for his failures.
**[Donate $15](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=1eaf6e15dd&e=32f1a3df98) \- [Donate $50](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=c8df5fbf7a&e=32f1a3df98) \- [Donate $100](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=f0b7aeabf7&e=32f1a3df98)**
The Inslee Record:
* After promising four years ago that he’d fix education funding – with no excuses – he failed to present even one proposal
* Homelessness has increased 42% in King County alone and is worsening throughout the state
* Traffic in Seattle is now the 4th worst in the country
* After promising four years ago that he’d veto any tax increase, he proposed more than $1 billion in new taxes
* More than 3,000 criminals were mistakenly released from prison before completing their sentence
* 185 patients escaped the state’s largest mental hospital with dozens still at large
* When the governor learned of the escapes, he mislead the public and the Legislature, and covered up investigations and the subsequent loss of the accreditation

After four years of broken promises, cover-ups, and failures, it is time for a new leader for Washington.
###

body:
There's a good chance they'll be talking about Indiana at tonight's presidential debate. But what about Saturday?
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4755160625929910272/5395172216482957312?utm_campaign=fnd_sepeom_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160926_fnd_gq_sepeom_ndn_1_jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
Peter, At tonight's presidential debate -- and after -- a lot of folks will be talking about what role Indiana will play in the national election. But our state is more than a pawn on a "battlefield" \-- it's home for Hoosiers like you and me. And who we choose to be our governor matters. That's why I'm reaching out to you now. This Friday, I'm facing the biggest fundraising deadline of the election so far -- and I need your help to reach our $25,000 fundraising goal. **Peter, will you chip in $5 and make your first donation now, before we file our final end-of-quarter fundraising report?** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4755160625929910272/5395172216482957312?utm_campaign=fnd_sepeom_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160926_fnd_gq_sepeom_ndn_1_jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&express_lane=true&amount=5)
---

| **For Immediate Release:**
Tuesday, September 27, 2016

**Contact:** Ethan Latour
[ethan@philscott.org](mailto:ethan@philscott.org)
(802) 595-3776
**Phil Scott Tours Hospitals, Presents Healthcare Plan to Employees**
_Scott’s plan puts Vermont back on path to affordable, accessible care_
_Springfield, VT & Lebanon, NH_ – Phil Scott, candidate for Governor, today toured Springfield Hospital and presented his healthcare reform priorities to a group of Dartmouth-Hitchcock Medical Center employees as part of the hospital’s Health Policy Grand Rounds series.

Scott told the group of healthcare professionals and administrators that he’s running for Governor to strengthen the economy, make Vermont more affordable and to restore faith and trust in state government, explaining that getting healthcare reform back on track is central to these goals.

“Frankly, I’m the only candidate in this race who knows what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck while raising a family and growing a business in Vermont. I believe it’s essential that Vermont restore its economic foundation so families can be more secure and we can afford to make the investments we need to make,” Scott told the assembled healthcare providers. “I recently presented a detailed blueprint of my priorities which outlines how I will approach this very challenging task. A core element to this plan is a detailed approach for putting healthcare reform back on track, and working toward our goal of providing affordable and accessible care for every Vermonter.”

Scott said making progress requires setting aside ideological crusades and “working together to craft a system that is more efficient, innovative and can care for everyone.”

Among other proposals, Scott’s plan includes moving to a functional health insurance exchange with more affordable options, while preserving subsidies; getting Medicaid and long-term care costs under control; enforcing full price transparency; and changing federal laws to allow Vermonters to purchase insurance across state lines.

“We also need to acknowledge the reality that bending the cost curve is going to require a relentless focus on improving the overall health of the population. And that’s going to take time,” Scott noted. “Yes, government has an important role to play and payment reform will help. It also means accepting that we need to make healthier choices and continue to reduce, and better manage, preventable, chronic and expensive diseases like diabetes and heart disease.”

Scott urged attendees to read his full plan at [www.PhilScott.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a5f950a918&e=19cebfe173)

Dartmouth-Hitchcock’s Health Policy Grand Rounds program is modeled after Dartmouth-Hitchcock’s clinical grand rounds, to offer an educational forum for staff on current health care and health policy issues.
###

But this is our _final FEC quarterly deadline before the election_ , and all eyes are on us. We NEED to hit our goal, but the truth is, we're $49,782 short.

clean_body: END OF QUARTER DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT FRIDAY | The clock is ticking, we mean it. Not just until Friday's FEC filing deadline, but until Election Day. And this race is still too close to call. Almost every poll AND statistical guru Nate Silver have called our race as a "toss-up," a statistical tie, or within the margin of error. It's time to end this, once and for all - Our campaign relies on grassroots donations (unlike Pat Toomey, with his Wall Street friends, out-of-state billionaire donors and his GOP ally Mitch McConnell), so we're used to cutting it close to the wire. But this is our final FEC quarterly deadline before the election , and all eyes are on us. We NEED to hit our goal, but the truth is, we're $49,782 short. We've got to pick up the pace if we're going to make it by Friday. That's why we're reaching out to you, and all our other loyal supporters. 42 days to go - Official McGinty Campaign | * A note on donations Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. name: Tim Henderson, GreggForGovernor.com
subject: Peter, John won at the debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
John just scored a big win at the first debate this morning. But here's the thing: Debates don't win elections -- votes do.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5269696883356989440/-2459105533651187712?utm_campaign=fnd_sepeoq_2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160927_fnd_gq_sepeoq_ndn_2_th&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
Peter, John just scored a big win at the first debate this morning. It's more clear than ever that John is the one with the experience and the vision to lead our state to a brighter future. But here's the thing: Debates don't win elections -- votes do. If the opposition mobilizes more voters in the final 41 days of this race, they'll win another four years of putting partisan politics over people. We can only beat them if we have the resources we need. **Peter, we still need to raise $21,283 to reach our goal by Friday. name: Katherine Van Hollen
subject: he'll keep fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
Friend, I first met Chris discussing our different musical tastes, favorite movies and yes -- debating nuclear weapons policy and the nuclear freeze movement. Little did I know that 30 years later his passion to make our communities and our world a safer and better place would still be a defining theme of our lives together.

But I should have guessed, because Chris has always been a strong believer that government can be an important force for good. Sadly, we are living in a time when the radical ideology of groups like the Tea Party are undermining faith in our democracy. For the last 6 years Republican control of Congress has enabled these extremists to control the agenda and block efforts to make progress.

That's why Washington Republicans and their big-money friends are determined not to lose their majority. They're trying to turn the tide of this election in races across the country--and Maryland won't be an exception.

Over the past few months, top Republicans like Scott Walker and Carly Fiorina have been helping fund our Republican opponent's agenda. They -- just like the NRA and a shady SuperPAC that has already started attacking Chris -- know that our opponent will stand with them if she's elected.

Chris won't.

Chris has spent his time in public service fighting to keep dark money out of politics, end gun violence, and advance the issues that matter most to the people of Maryland. And when he's elected to the U.S. Senate, his opponent's big-money friends know that he'll keep fighting for our values and priorities.

Early voting begins in Maryland in less than 30 days, friend. **[Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help keep us reach our September goal before Friday's FEC deadline? ](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ace/70cdc2ba/471bf0b7/39758e5/621289722/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em092716_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+chip+in+25+or+whatever+you+can+&utm_campaign=em092716_1&source=em092716_1")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ace/70cdc2ba/471bf0b7/39758e2/621289722/VEsE/ **[Donate $10 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ace/70cdc2ba/471bf0b7/39758e3/621289722/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em092716_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Donate+10+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em092716_1&source=em092716_1")** **[Donate $25 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ace/70cdc2ba/471bf0b7/39758e0/621289722/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em092716_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Donate+25+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em092716_1&source=em092716_1")** **[Donate $50 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ace/70cdc2ba/471bf0b7/39758e1/621289722/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em092716_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Donate+50+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em092716_1&source=em092716_1")** **[Donate $100 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ace/70cdc2ba/471bf0b7/39758fe/621289722/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em092716_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Donate+100+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em092716_1&source=em092716_1")** **[Donate $200 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ace/70cdc2ba/471bf0b7/39758ff/621289722/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?express_lane=true&amount=200&refcode=em092716_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=7+-+Donate+200+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em092716_1&source=em092716_1")** **[Or donate another amount to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ace/70cdc2ba/471bf0b7/39758fc/621289722/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em092716_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount+to+stand+with+C&utm_campaign=em092716_1&source=em092716_1")** Polls show that 19% of the electorate in Maryland is still undecided. We need to do better than that. With less than one month until early voting we must do everything we can to turn out as many voters as possible and move our state and our country forward.

Thank you for being part of this,

Katherine

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Eric=20Trump?=
subject: Record-breaking…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
We just alerted the media, so now we have to make sure it happens. |

Friend, I just learned that we’re only $1 MILLION away from raising a record amount of money in a 24-hour period. We’ve already alerted the media how close we are to breaking this record, and now they’re waiting to see if we can actually make it happen. The press is reporting on it as we speak. But you and I both know that if we don’t break this record now, they’ll use that against us to boost Hillary. Please help us SHATTER our record for a 24-hour period by making a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25 or even $3 -- any amount will help us right now. Friend: this is the final sprint of the election. Our final end-of-quarter deadline is in just three days and the second debate is only 12 days from today. My father always taught me that the secret to winning is to never quit while you’re ahead. We have to keep fighting, we have to keep pushing, we can’t get complacent and give up. This is our moment to surge in the polls to win big this November. Now help us SHATTER our record for a 24-hour period by making a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25 or even $3 -- any amount will help us right now. Thanks, Eric Trump CONTRIBUTE $100

subject: After last night (important)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
There are only six weeks between now and Election Day. And make no mistake about it -- for Democrats to win, we need to make every single one of them count.
---

name: Barack Obama
subject: I need you to show her, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
Hillary did her job last night | | Derek --

I’m so proud of Hillary today.

I’ve been on that debate stage: I know the pressure and the weight of expectation that comes with big nights like last night.

But Hillary didn’t flinch. She showed the grace, poise, and fierce intelligence we’ve come to know and respect -- qualities that will make her an outstanding president.

Hillary did her job last night -- standing up for each and every American by pushing back against Trump -- and now, it’s time that we do ours. With only 42 days left until Election Day, we can't leave anything to chance.

The final quarterly FEC fundraising deadline is this Friday. Show Hillary you’re not just with her on the big nights -- you’re fighting by her side every single day.

**Chip in right now, and help her team reach their goal of 2.5 million grassroots donors by Friday at midnight.** | **You’re one of our most committed supporters. If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately:

I know how much your support means to Hillary.

name: Lois Frankel
subject: Hang on, we need you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2df6/738133e4/314fbf39/7f8541b8/2426884128/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160927pm2?refcode=pme160927pm2_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")
---
| **One of the most important Senate contests of this election year is happening in Florida.** But we can't just fill up our popcorn buckets, grab a seat, and watch it unfold.

**We need to help Patrick Murphy win.** We need to throw our grassroots support behind him, make sure he wins, and reclaim majority control of the Senate from Republicans.

[_**Right now, polls have Patrick 's opponent ahead by just TWO percentage points. Patrick MUST close this gap. His last quarterly FEC deadline is in 48 hours. Please pitch in $5, $10 or any amount you give.**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2df6/738133e4/314fbf39/7f8541b8/2426884128/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160927pm2?refcode=pme160927pm2_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

This Senate race has been a rollercoaster.

But through all of it, Patrick has held on tight. That's because he cares about Floridians and he cares about serving them. He wants this job. **I know Florida and I know Patrick. There is no other choice on Election Day.**

[_**Patrick 's team CANNOT miss this goal if they want to compete. Rush in $5 so Patrick's opponent and his rich Republican donors don't drown him out.**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2df6/738133e4/314fbf39/7f8541b8/2426884128/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160927pm2?refcode=pme160927pm2_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Thank you,

Lois |

body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504db/7be36b49/1ea26b4d/78f84560/4098876899/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")

[](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504db/7be36b49/1ea26b4d/78f84567/4098876899/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-septeoq?refcode=20160927.2nd&amount=10") **End-of-quarter deadline: FRIDAY
[Chip in $5 (all gifts MATCHED) to help us hit our $50,000 goal!](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504db/7be36b49/1ea26b4d/78f84567/4098876899/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-septeoq?refcode=20160927.2nd&amount=10")**
Friend, we're getting down to the wire. The end-of-quarter deadline hits in just three days, and we still have $43,771 left to raise.

We're not exaggerating: Hitting this goal could determine the course of this entire election. Here's why:
* We're in a "toss-up" race
* The _Washington Post_ just called Indiana "the surprise battleground state"
* But Todd Young is getting MILLIONS from his Wall Street allies

**Friend, we don 't have to match them dollar for dollar -- but we DO have to outwork them on the ground! **And that takes resources.

**[DON'T WAIT. Pitch in $5 now to ensure that Indiana gets the senator we deserve: Middle-class champion Evan Bayh!](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504db/7be36b49/1ea26b4d/78f84567/4098876899/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-septeoq?refcode=20160927.2nd&amount=10")** Your gift will be matched through Friday's deadline!

Thanks,

Hoosiers for Evan

**[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504db/7be36b49/1ea26b4d/78f84566/4098876899/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-septeoq?refcode=20160927.2nd&amount=25")**
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204
